Change Log root/change_log.md

[2026-04-23] — Context Window & LLM Optimization Guide

Added

  • IG_Context_Window_and_LLM_Optimization_Guide.docx — 20-page guide covering 5 strategies: context window management (~130K tokens), conditional information injection, LLM call efficiency (prompt caching, intent caching, semantic cache), cost reduction (40–60% projected), and quality improvement (structured outputs, few-shot, CoT, RLHF iteration)
  • Includes current state token breakdown per component, cost profile by agent tier, 8 identified inefficiencies, per-agent context budgets, implementation roadmap (4 phases), 3 appendices (token counts, cost comparison, before/after prompt templates)
  • Generator script: Transformation Documents/generate_context_optimization_doc.py

[2026-04-08] — Flydocs Leadership Interview Templates & Agent Prompts

Added

  • Flydocs_Leadership_Interview_Templates.docx — Structured interview templates for 7 senior leadership roles (CFO, CPO/CHRO, CTDO, CPO Product, CCO, SVP Engineering, Head BI & Strategy); 12 scored questions per role; 70 productivity metrics; composite scoring guide
  • Flydocs_Interview_Agent_Prompts.docx — Claude Code system prompts for AI interview agent: Master System Prompt, 7 role-specific prompts with observation criteria & red flags, Post-Interview Analysis Prompt, Cross-Role Comparison Prompt

[2026-04-06] — Login Page Design Concepts

Added

  • Login design mockups — 4 standalone HTML login page concepts in login-designs/
  • Design A: Social-First + Tabs — Google hero CTA, tabbed magic link/password toggle, white minimal centered
  • Design B: Immersive Brand Wall — 60/40 split, animated gradient mesh blobs, testimonial card, white form panel
  • Design C: Conversational Choices — Two illustrated choice cards with progressive disclosure animation
  • Design D: Dark + App Preview — Dark full-screen with form left, 3D perspective dashboard mockup right
  • Each page includes inter-design nav bar, brand colors, and Logo-Dark/Light.png assets
  • Index page at login-designs/index.html links to all 4 designs

[2026-04-04] — Corrections & Re-Entry Business Plan

Added

  • Transformation Documents/IG_Corrections_Reentry_Business_Plan.docx — 30-page business plan for deploying InspiresGenius in correctional facilities
  • Theme: "Opportunities for Correction & Direction"
  • 13 sections: Executive Summary, Problem Analysis, Solution, Platform Capabilities, Security & Compliance, Job Blueprint Pipeline, Stakeholder Benefits, User Segments, Pricing (100K–500K users), Implementation Roadmap, Market Opportunity, Risk Mitigation, Appendices
  • Tiered pricing: $8–$22 PUPM; 5-year revenue projection of $149.5M
  • Corrections TAM: $8.6B across 6.8M individuals
  • 10 user segments mapped to IG's 6-role architecture; 5-stage employer-employee Job Blueprint pipeline
  • Enhanced DOC admin dashboard with whitelist-only access, activity monitoring, CJIS compliance

[2026-03-31] — RLHF Service Build + Full Documentation Update

Added (RLHF Service)

  • services/rlhf-service/ — new FastAPI + Mangum microservice for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (25+ files)
  • 5 Lambda handlers: Collector (API), Processor (EventBridge), Training (Step Functions), Evaluation (EventBridge), Registry (API)
  • Feedback Collector (POST /v1/feedback, GET /v1/feedback): thumbs/rating/text/comparison feedback, spam detection, DynamoDB storage, EventBridge events
  • Feedback Processor: normalizes to JSONL reward signals [-1.0, 1.0], stores in S3 by agent/date/session
  • Training Pipeline (7-step Step Functions): aggregate, validate (min 1000 samples), 80/20 split, SageMaker job, status poll, evaluate, register
  • Model Registry (/v1/rlhf/models/*): list/get/approve/promote/rollback/A/B test; active model pointer with candidate traffic splitting
  • Model Evaluation: auto-approval at accuracy ≥ 85% and avg reward ≥ 70%
  • DynamoDB tables: rlhf-feedback (pk=SESSION#, sk=FEEDBACK#, GSI: AGENT#) and rlhf-model-registry (pk=MODEL#, sk=METADATA, GSI: MODELS)
  • EventBridge events: FeedbackSubmitted, ModelAutoApproved, ModelPendingReview, ModelApproved, ModelPromoted, ModelRolledBack, AbTestStarted
  • 6 test files with moto mocks for DynamoDB, S3, SageMaker, EventBridge, Step Functions

Changed (Documentation Update)

  • Updated CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/architecture.md, .claude/rules/workflow.md, database_schema.md with RLHF service details
  • Updated IG_project_log.html changelog + session prompts; synced all 5 copy locations

[2026-03-30] — Alex-to-Meridian Persona Rename + Agent Engine Phase 8 + Voice Deprecation

Changed (Meridian Rename)

  • Renamed all user-visible "Alex" references to "Meridian" in system prompts, agent classes, WebSocket handlers, test assertions, and documentation across backend + agent-engine
  • Added backward-compatibility aliases (alex_guide_prompt = meridian_guide_prompt, etc.)
  • Updated ALEX_WEBSOCKET_DOCS.md title and persona references to "Meridian"
  • WebSocket endpoint URLs (/v1/agents/ws/alex-chat) kept unchanged for client compatibility

Added (Agent Engine Phase 8)

  • MCP Tools (app/tools/): 5 tools (web_search, code_interpreter, calendar, email, document_search); permission-aware MCPServer with quota enforcement
  • Collaboration (app/collaboration/): Agent-to-agent protocol (REQUEST/RESPONSE/DELEGATE/INFORM), SharedContext, MultiAgentConversation orchestrator
  • Analytics (app/analytics/): AnalyticsTracker for response quality/satisfaction/session outcomes/errors, cost estimation per model tier
  • Permissions (app/permissions/): 6-role hierarchy, ToolPermission access tiers (PUBLIC/MANAGER/ADMIN/PRACTITIONER/SYSTEM), QuotaTracker
  • 141 new tests (350 total, up from 209), all passing

Changed (Voice Deprecation)

  • Added deprecation notice + X-Deprecated header to tour narration /{text_id}/audio-stream endpoint (moving to VoiceDeskAI)
  • 13 new regression tests for audio endpoints

[2026-03-30] — Auth Service Lambda Extraction (Phase 2 Strangler Fig)

Added

  • services/auth-service/ — new FastAPI + Mangum microservice (31 files) extracted from monolith
  • 12 endpoints: login, signup, verify-otp, resend-otp, forgot-password, reset-password, refresh-token, logout, magic-auth, validate-token, me, health
  • Dual JWT middleware — RS256 (Cognito JWKs) + HS256 (Magic Auth symmetric key) with automatic algorithm detection
  • DynamoDB rate limiting — 5 attempts per IP per 15-min window; auth-rate-limits table with TTL auto-cleanup
  • EventBridge events — auth.user.login, auth.user.signup, auth.user.logout, auth.token.refresh
  • CDK infrastructure — Lambda (reserved=100, provisioned=10 warm), DynamoDB table, IAM, 12 API Gateway routes, CloudWatch alarms
  • Test suite — test_login, test_signup, test_rate_limit, test_jwt

[2026-03-30] — CDK Auto-Scaling, Alarms & Throttling Configuration

Added

  • Lambda reserved & provisioned concurrency — Auth=100, Audit=50, Phase 5=50 each, RLHF=25 each; prod-only provisioned concurrency: Auth 10 warm, Audit 5 warm via aliases
  • DynamoDB auto-scaling (prod only) — Auth rate-limit table, RLHF feedback + registry tables at 70% target utilization
  • 33 CloudWatch Alarms — Lambda duration/errors/throttles for all 10 functions + 3 Aurora alarms (CPU, connections, ACU)
  • ECS scheduled scaling — business hours 8am-8pm EST weekdays: prod min 5 / staging min 3; off-hours min 2; TaskCount alarm
  • API Gateway throttling — env-dependent defaults (prod 1000/500, staging 500/250, dev 100/50); per-route throttling on 4 auth endpoints

Fixed

  • rlhf-stack.ts — added tryBundle local stub for Docker-less CDK synth; renamed reserved AWS_REGION env var to AWS_REGION_OVERRIDE

Files

  • infrastructure/cdk/lib/services-stack.ts
  • infrastructure/cdk/lib/agent-engine-stack.ts
  • infrastructure/cdk/lib/api-gateway-stack.ts
  • infrastructure/cdk/lib/rlhf-stack.ts

[2026-03-24] — Fix PRISM Flow, Documents, Feedback, Analytics, Help Pages

Changed — PRISM (User)

  • "Request Survey" button now navigates to the assessment form page (/prism-assessment) instead of calling the API directly; menu item renamed to "Request Assessment"

Fixed — Documents (User)

  • Documents service now uses robust BaseApiResponse envelope unwrapping; stale cache cleared on mount
  • Upload fixed by removing manually-set Content-Type: multipart/form-data header (was breaking multipart boundary); React Query cache invalidated on upload success so the list refreshes automatically

Fixed — Feedback (User / Super-Admin)

  • Feedback page wired to real /v1/feedback and /v1/feedback/stats APIs with pagination and rating filters
  • All hardcoded mock data removed

Added — Analytics (User)

  • Placeholder banner added to Analytics page indicating no real backend endpoint is available yet

Added — Help & Support (User)

  • Voice Help card added to Help & Support page with a placeholder link for a future voice agent URL

[2026-03-24] — Fix User, Manager, Company Admin Dashboards — Data Loading, Missing Routes, PRISM

Fixed — User Dashboard

  • Sidebar now shows "User Pages" nav section when super-admin visits via Role Views
  • Stat tiles wired to real audit stats API (replaced hardcoded dummy data)
  • PRISM services fixed to unwrap resp.data correctly (fixes behavioral report status and survey request)
  • Coach list now handles both flat array and nested response shapes (fixes coaches not loading)
  • Documents service unwraps BaseApiResponse envelope (fixes documents not populating)
  • Quick Actions "Set New Goal" button now routes to /coaches instead of chat

Fixed — Manager Dashboard

  • Created 7 missing pages (Candidates, Interviews, JobDna, Training, CareerManagement, TeamBuilding, Leadership) with Coming Soon placeholders — sidebar links no longer reset to main screen
  • Added "Sample data" placeholder banner to Dashboard, Team, Hiring, and Analytics pages

Fixed — Company Admin Dashboard

  • Created Training and Leadership pages (missing routes were causing sidebar resets)
  • Rebuilt blank Organization page with org chart placeholder and department table
  • Added content to blank Settings page (org profile, security, notifications, billing sections)
  • Dashboard stat tiles are now clickable; "Add User" button shows toast notification
  • Added placeholder data banner to all Company Admin pages

[2026-03-24] — Add Cross-Role Navigation for Super-Admin

Added

  • SidebarScaffold — new optional navSections prop supporting grouped navigation sections
  • Super-admin sidebar now has two named sections: "Administration" (existing admin tools) and "Role Views" (links to User Home, Manager, Company Admin, Practitioner, and Distributor dashboards)

Changed

  • AppShell — detects super-admin role from AuthContext and overrides the sidebar role so the full super-admin navigation is always displayed regardless of which page the super-admin is visiting
  • UserLayout — detects super-admin role and shows admin sections instead of user-only nav items
  • When a super-admin navigates to any role's page (e.g., /home, /manager/dashboard), the sidebar continues to show the full super-admin navigation rather than that role's nav

[2026-03-24] — Wire PRISM "Request Survey" Button to Real API

Changed

  • src/pages/user/Home.tsx — "Request Survey" button on the Home dashboard now calls the PRISM initiate API via usePrismInitiate hook instead of navigating to /prism-assessment
  • Button displays "Requesting..." loading state while the API call is in flight
  • Button is disabled when an assessment is already in progress (assessmentInProgress) or when the mutation is pending
  • Fixed TypeScript operator precedence error in surname fallback logic

[2026-03-15] — Fix Magic Link Authentication Flow — Dual Auth Mode Support

Fixed

  • Updated IG backend auth.py to accept both Cognito RS256 tokens and Magic Auth HS256 tokens (no kid header)
  • Aligned Magic Auth Lambda JWT_SECRET with IG backend SECRET_KEY
  • Backend now serves magic link authenticated users without requiring Cognito user attributes

[2026-03-14] — Replace MFA/OTP Login with Magic Link

Changed

  • src/pages/auth/Login.tsx — Magic link is now the primary login method. Users enter email, receive sign-in link via email, click to authenticate. Password login available as secondary option.
  • src/context/AuthContext.tsx — MFA verification now sends a magic link instead of redirecting to the OTP page. Signup email verification also sends a magic link instead of OTP.

[2026-03-14] — Integration Evaluation & Migration Planning Documents

Added

  • Integration_Evaluation_Report.docx — ~20-page evaluation of architecture integration (effort, cost, scalability, maintainability, extensibility, pros/cons, risks, recommendation)
  • IG_Migration_Implementation_Plan.docx — ~30-page detailed microservices transition plan with rollback strategies, phased timeline, bug fix allocation, dependency map, cost estimates

[2026-03-14] — Backend Purge Endpoint & Audit SQL Fix

Added

  • Backend: DELETE /v1/user-management/users/purge/inactive endpoint — hard-deletes all soft-deleted users from DB and Cognito

Fixed

  • Backend: audit_routes.py — fixed SQL syntax error (:details::jsonb → CAST(:details AS jsonb)) causing all audit log inserts to fail
  • Frontend: purgeInactiveUsers() — now calls backend purge endpoint directly instead of client-side fetch+delete loop that failed for soft-deleted users

Database Schema root/database_schema.md

User (AuthUser)

FieldTypeNotes
idstring (UUID)Primary key
emailstringUnique
namestring?Display name
fullNamestring?Full name
rolestring"user" or "super-admin"
isOnboardingCompletedbooleanOnboarding status

LoginDataPayload (Auth Response)

FieldTypeNotes
sessionstring?Session identifier
access_tokenstring?JWT access token
refresh_tokenstring?JWT refresh token
id_tokenstring?Identity token
token_typestring?e.g. "Bearer"
user_idstring?User UUID
emailstring?User email
full_namestring?User full name
rolestring?User role
has_profileboolean?Whether profile exists
is_onboardedboolean/string?Onboarding status
organization_idstring?FK → Organization
business_idstring?FK → Business
mfa_requiredboolean?Whether MFA is required
next_stepstring?Auth flow next step

UserRow (Admin User Management)

FieldTypeNotes
idstringPrimary key
namestringDisplay name
emailstringEmail
first_namestring?First name
last_namestring?Last name
statusenum"Active", "Deactivated", "Awaiting"
invitation_idstring?FK → Invitation
invitation_statusstringInvitation state

Organization

FieldTypeNotes
organization_idstring?Primary key
organization_namestringName
typestringOrganization type
emailstringContact email
contactstringContact number
website_urlstringWebsite
addressstringAddress
coachesCoachInfo[]Assigned coaches
license_typestringLicense type
license_keystringLicense key
license_start_datestring?License start
license_end_datestring?License expiry

OrganizationRow (Admin List)

FieldTypeNotes
idstringPrimary key
namestringName
typestringType
statusenum"Active", "Deactivated"
admin_is_activebooleanAdmin account active

CoachInfo

FieldTypeNotes
idstringPrimary key
agentIdstringFK → Agent
toneIdsstring[]FK → Tone[]
accentIdstringFK → Accent
genderIdstringFK → Gender

ProfileData (User Settings)

FieldTypeNotes
firstNamestringFirst name
lastNamestringLast name
emailstringEmail
dateOfBirthstringDate string
categorystringUser category
rolestringUser role
additionalInfostring?Bio/about text
passwordChangeAllowedboolean?Whether password change is enabled

DocItem (Documents)

FieldTypeNotes
idstringPrimary key
namestringFile name
kindenum"pdf", "csv", "ppt", "doc"
createdAtDateUpload date
urlstringDownload URL

ChatMessage

FieldTypeNotes
idstringMessage ID
kindenum"text", "doc", "processing"
senderenum"assistant", "user"
textstring?Message text
timestringTimestamp

HistoryItem (Conversation History)

FieldTypeNotes
idstringConversation ID
titlestringConversation title
previewstringLast message preview
timeLabelstringRelative time label

HelpFormValues (Issue Submission)

FieldTypeNotes
issueTypeIdstringFK → IssueType
subjectstringIssue subject
descriptionstringDescription
priorityenum"low", "medium", "high", "critical"
attachmentsFile[]Attached files

IssueType

FieldTypeNotes
idstringPrimary key
namestringType name

Dashboard Analytics

EntityFieldsPurpose
ChartDatumorgName (string), hours (number)Avg time spent per org
CoachUsageDatamonth (string), desktop (number), mobile (number)Coach usage by platform
DocumentUploadDatabrowser (string), Uploads (number), color (string)Upload trends by browser

API Envelope

All responses wrapped in: BaseApiResponse<T> { status, success, message, error_status, data }

DynamoDB: auth-rate-limits (Auth Service Rate Limiting)

FieldTypeNotes
pkstringPartition key: ip#{client_ip}
skstringSort key: attempt#{timestamp_ms}
expires_atnumberTTL: epoch seconds (auto-deleted after 15 min)

Access: Query by pk, count attempts in 15-min window. Limit: 5 per IP. Scaling: PAY_PER_REQUEST in dev, PROVISIONED + auto-scaling in prod.

Environment Variables

VariablePurpose
VITE_API_BASE_URLBackend API base URL
VITE_ALEX_WEBSOCKET_URLAlex voice assistant WebSocket
VITE_AGENTS_WEBSOCKET_BASE_URLAgent WebSocket base
VITE_STORAGE_SECRETEncryption key for secure storage

CLAUDE.md root/CLAUDE.md

Project Overview

Inspire Genius is an AI coaching platform frontend. The app code lives entirely in inspire-genius-frontend/. There is a Python venv/ at the repo root (not related to the frontend).

Commands (from inspire-genius-frontend/)

  • npm run dev — Start Vite dev server
  • npm run build — TypeScript check + Vite production build
  • npm run lint — ESLint
  • npm run test — Jest in watch mode
  • npm run test:ci — Jest single run (CI)
  • npm run test:coverage — Jest with coverage report

Stack

React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7 + Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui (new-york style, slate base)

Data Flow Pattern

Service → Hook → Component

  • Services (src/services/): Axios calls organized by domain (auth, coaches, documents, help, onboarding, super-admin, alex/chat, user)
  • Hooks (src/hooks/): React Query mutations/queries wrapping services. Server state via TanStack React Query.
  • Pages (src/pages/): Route-level components organized by role (auth, onboarding, user, manager, company-admin, practitioner, distributor, super-admin, legal)

Global State

React Context only (no Redux/Zustand)

  • AuthContext — auth lifecycle, token management, role-based navigation
  • TourContext — guided tour with audio narration
  • SidebarContext — sidebar UI state

Routing (src/routes.tsx)

  • Public: /login, /signup, /otp, /forgot, /reset-password, /accept-invitation, /social-login, /terms, /privacy
  • User: /home, /dashboard, /coaches, /documents, /settings, /help, /onboarding/*
  • Manager: /manager/*
  • Company Admin: /company-admin/*
  • Practitioner: /practitioner/*
  • Distributor: /distributor/*
  • Super Admin: /super-admin/*
  • ProtectedRoute enforces auth, role checks, and onboarding completion

Six User Roles (defined in src/constants/routes.ts as ROLES enum)

  • user — end user / employee receiving coaching
  • manager — supervisory role with direct-report visibility
  • company-admin — organization-level administrator
  • practitioner — PRISM-accredited coach, uses IG as business platform
  • distributor — regional wholesaler of PRISM credits to Practitioners
  • super-admin — platform owner, full access

API Layer (src/lib/axios.ts)

  • Singleton axios instance, base URL from VITE_API_BASE_URL env var (default http://localhost:3000)
  • Request interceptor injects access-token from encrypted storage
  • Response interceptor handles 401 with single-flight token refresh, auto-retry, or logout

Auth Storage

src/lib/secureStorage.ts + src/lib/storage.ts — sensitive data (tokens) via encrypted storage wrapper. Keys centralized in STORAGE_KEYS enum.

UI Components

src/components/ui/: shadcn/ui library. Add new components via npx shadcn@latest add <component>. Path alias @/ maps to src/.

Testing

Jest + jsdom + React Testing Library, tests colocated in __tests__/ directories. CSS modules mocked via identity-obj-proxy.

Microservices (services/)

Phase 2 Strangler Fig extraction — endpoints migrated from monolith to independent Lambda-backed microservices.

Auth Service (services/auth-service/) — Status: Extracted

  • FastAPI + Mangum Lambda microservice (31 files)
  • 12 endpoints: login, signup, verify-otp, resend-otp, forgot-password, reset-password, refresh-token, logout, magic-auth, validate-token, me, health
  • Dual JWT: RS256 (Cognito) + HS256 (Magic Auth)
  • DynamoDB rate limiting: 5 attempts / IP / 15 min
  • EventBridge events: auth.user.login, auth.user.signup, auth.user.logout, auth.token.refresh
  • Commands: uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001, pytest tests/ -v

CDK Infrastructure (infrastructure/cdk/)

  • Lambda Concurrency — Reserved per function (Auth=100, Audit=50, Phase 5=50, RLHF=25); provisioned concurrency in prod (Auth 10, Audit 5 warm)
  • DynamoDB Scaling — PAY_PER_REQUEST in dev/staging; PROVISIONED + auto-scaling at 70% target in prod
  • ECS Scheduled Scaling — Business hours 8am-8pm EST weekdays: prod min 5, staging min 3; off-hours min 2
  • API Gateway Throttling — prod 1000/500, staging 500/250, dev 100/50; per-route throttling on auth endpoints
  • CloudWatch Alarms — 33 alarms: Lambda duration/errors/throttles (10 functions) + 3 Aurora alarms (CPU, connections, ACU)
  • CDK Conventions — use tryBundle stubs for local synth; avoid reserved AWS env var names

Key Conventions

  • Route constants in src/constants/routes.ts (ROUTES, ROLES, STORAGE_KEYS, NEXT_STEPS)
  • Forms use React Hook Form + Zod validation
  • Notifications via Sonner toast (<Toaster> in App.tsx)
  • Icons from lucide-react
  • Path alias: @/ → src/ (configured in Vite, tsconfig, and jest)
  • After making notable changes, update change_log.md and IG_project_log.html
  • After every user prompt, append it to the session_prompts section in IG_project_log.html

Project Documentation

  • change_log.md — chronological record of all project changes
  • database_schema.md — frontend data models and API entity schemas
  • IG_project_log.html — standalone HTML dashboard with all docs + session prompt history
  • .claude/rules/ — development rules (code-style, architecture, workflow, session-logging)
  • Project Log page available at /super-admin/project-log in the app

Global Session Behavior

Automatic Logging: Every session automatically logs activity to IG_project_log.html and change_log.md via deterministic hooks.

Hooks (.claude/settings.json)

  • UserPromptSubmit → logs prompt to session_prompts section
  • PostToolUse (Edit/Write) → logs file modifications to session_activity + change_log.md
  • Stop → logs session end

Python Hook Script

.claude/hooks/update_project_log.py — standalone Python 3 script (no pip dependencies) that updates HTML log entries, increments prompt count badge, appends to change_log.md, and syncs all copy locations.

Slash Commands

  • /log-session — summarize and log current session's changes to both log files
  • /sync-logs — sync IG_project_log.html and change_log.md to all copy locations
  • /project-status — show recent project activity summary
  • /bedtime — end-of-day session wrap-up with full doc sync
  • /doc-update — full documentation update across all files and copy locations

Log File Locations (keep in sync)

  • ./IG_project_log.html (project root — primary)
  • ./inspire-genius-frontend/public/IG_project_log.html (served by Vite/S3)
  • ./inspire-genius-frontend/IG_project_log.html (frontend root copy)
  • ./change_log.md (project root — primary)
  • ./inspire-genius-frontend/change_log.md (frontend copy)

Model Task Assignments

TaskModel
Agent architecture, DB schema designOpus
FastAPI endpoints, React componentsSonnet
Git commits, docstrings, boilerplateHaiku
PRISM scoring logic, cost modelingOpus
i18n translation file editsHaiku

Code Style Rules .claude/rules/code-style.md

TypeScript

  • Strict TypeScript; avoid any — use proper types from src/types/
  • Use type for object shapes, interface only when extending
  • Prefer named exports for components, default exports for pages

React

  • Functional components only
  • React Hook Form + Zod for forms
  • TanStack React Query for server state
  • Context for global state only (auth, tour, sidebar)

Styling

  • Tailwind CSS utilities only — no CSS modules
  • cn() from @/lib/utils for conditional classes
  • shadcn/ui from @/components/ui/
  • lucide-react icons exclusively

File Organization

  • Pages: src/pages/{auth,onboarding,user,super-admin,legal}/
  • Tests: __tests__/ next to source
  • Services: src/services/ by domain
  • Hooks: src/hooks/ by domain
  • Types: src/types/ by domain

Architecture Rules .claude/rules/architecture.md

Data Flow

Service → Hook → Component (never call services from components directly)

API Layer

  • All HTTP via singleton axios in src/lib/axios.ts
  • Token injection & 401 refresh handled by interceptors
  • Responses follow BaseApiResponse<T> envelope

Auth

  • AuthContext manages auth lifecycle
  • useAuth() hook for auth state
  • ProtectedRoute enforces roles
  • Six roles: user, manager, company-admin, practitioner, distributor, super-admin
  • Encrypted storage for tokens

Routing

  • All routes in src/routes.tsx using useRoutes
  • Constants in src/constants/routes.ts
  • Role-specific route groups: /manager/*, /company-admin/*, /practitioner/*, /distributor/*, /super-admin/*
  • User pages → UserLayout, role layouts are thin wrappers around AppShell
  • Nav items per role in src/constants/navigation.ts (NAV_ITEMS_BY_ROLE)

Layouts

  • AppShell — unified 3-column layout (sidebar | main | right panel) used by ALL roles
  • Role-specific layouts (ManagerLayout, CompanyAdminLayout, PractitionerLayout, DistributorLayout, SuperAdminLayout, UserLayout)

Session Hooks & Commands

  • Deterministic hooks in .claude/settings.json fire on UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop events
  • Hook script .claude/hooks/update_project_log.py auto-logs session activity
  • Slash commands: /log-session, /sync-logs, /project-status, /bedtime, /doc-update

Microservices (services/)

  • Strangler Fig pattern: endpoints extracted from monolith into Lambda-backed FastAPI + Mangum services
  • Auth Service (services/auth-service/): 12 endpoints, dual JWT (RS256 + HS256), DynamoDB rate limiting, EventBridge events
  • Each microservice gets: Lambda, IAM role, CloudWatch alarms, API Gateway routes in services-stack.ts
  • Rate limiting via DynamoDB with TTL auto-cleanup
  • EventBridge for cross-service events (e.g. auth.user.login triggers audit)

CDK Infrastructure Conventions

  • Always add reservedConcurrentExecutions to new Lambda functions
  • Always add CloudWatch alarms (duration, errors, throttles) for new Lambdas
  • Use tryBundle local stubs for Docker-less CDK synth
  • Avoid reserved AWS env var names (e.g. use AWS_REGION_OVERRIDE not AWS_REGION)
  • DynamoDB: PAY_PER_REQUEST in dev, PROVISIONED + auto-scaling in prod
  • API Gateway: environment-dependent throttle tiers (prod/staging/dev)
  • ECS: scheduled scaling for business hours vs off-hours

Workflow Rules .claude/rules/workflow.md

Commands (from inspire-genius-frontend/)

  • Dev: npm run dev
  • Build: npm run build
  • Lint: npm run lint
  • Test: npm run test (watch) / npm run test:ci

Auth Service Commands (from services/auth-service/)

  • Install: pip install -r requirements.txt
  • Run locally: uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001
  • Test: pytest tests/ -v
  • Single test: pytest tests/test_login.py -v

Deployment

  • GitLab CI on "development" branch
  • Pipeline: build → SonarQube → S3 + CloudFront

Adding a New Role-Specific Page

  • 1. Create page in src/pages/{role}/, wrap with role layout
  • 2. Add route constant to ROUTES.{ROLE} in src/constants/routes.ts
  • 3. Add route in src/routes.tsx, add nav item to NAV_ITEMS_BY_ROLE

The 6 Roles

  • user, manager, company-admin, practitioner, distributor, super-admin

Slash Commands & Session Hooks

  • Commands: /log-session, /sync-logs, /project-status, /bedtime, /doc-update
  • Hooks: .claude/settings.json fires on UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop
  • Auto-logging: .claude/hooks/update_project_log.py

Documentation

  • Update change_log.md for notable changes
  • Update database_schema.md for data model changes
  • Update CLAUDE.md for architecture changes
  • Keep .claude/rules/ current

FileDescriptionCallsEnables
lib/axios.tsSingleton axios instance. Request interceptor injects token. Response interceptor handles 401 with single-flight refreshStorage functions, VITE_API_BASE_URL envCentralized HTTP with auto-auth, retry, cross-tab token sync
lib/crypto.tsAES-GCM encryption/decryption using Web Crypto API with PBKDF2 key derivationcrypto.subtleAt-rest encryption for sensitive frontend data
lib/secureStorage.tsEncrypted localStorage wrapper with AES-GCM. Fallback to plain JSON if crypto unavailablegetKey(), crypto.subtle, localStoragesecureSetItem/secureGetItem/secureRemoveItem
lib/storage.tsFacade for auth/UI state persistence. Token, user, email, role, session, onboarding, UI flagscrypto functions, STORAGE_KEYS, StoredUser typegetToken/setToken, getUser/setUser, clearAuth, getUIFlag/setUIFlag
lib/utils.tscn() function for conditional Tailwind class mergingclsx, twMergeType-safe dynamic styling app-wide
lib/scroll.tsSmooth scroll-to-element utilityElement.scrollIntoView()Tour step scrolling, focused navigation
lib/chatAudioDb.tsIndexedDB wrapper for encrypted chat audio. Stores, retrieves, prunes audio recordingsIndexedDB API, AES-GCM, WAV encoding, PBKDF2Persistent encrypted audio storage with auto-pruning

All pre-built accessible components from shadcn/ui (new-york style, slate base, Radix UI primitives):

ComponentPurpose
avatarProfile image with fallback initials
badgeLabel/tag display with variants
buttonButton with primary/secondary/outline/ghost variants
calendarDate picker calendar grid
cardContainer with header, title, description, footer
chartRecharts wrapper with responsive container
checkboxAccessible checkbox input
collapsibleExpandable/collapsible content
date-pickerPopover-based date picker
dialogModal dialog overlay (Radix Dialog)
drawerSlide-out drawer/sidebar
dropdown-menuDropdown with items (Radix)
formReact Hook Form integration (FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, etc.)
icon-inputText input with icon prefix/suffix
input-otpOTP input with pin entries
inputText input field
labelForm label (Radix Label)
menubarHorizontal menu bar
multi-selectMulti-select dropdown
otp-inputCustom OTP input
popoverFloating popover (Radix)
selectDropdown select (Radix)
separatorVisual divider line
sheetSide sheet/drawer overlay
sidebarSidebar layout with collapsible nav
skeletonLoading skeleton placeholder
sonnerToast notification provider
switchToggle switch (Radix)
tableData table with headers/body/rows/cells
tabsTab navigation (Radix)
textareaMulti-line text input
tooltipTooltip overlay (Radix)
FileDescriptionKey Types Defined
types/api.tsBase API response envelopeBaseApiResponse<T>
types/auth/api-types.tsAuth API typesLoginNextStep, LoginDataPayload, ApiEnvelope<T>
types/auth/context-types.tsAuth context state shapeAuthUser, AuthContextValue
types/auth/storage-types.tsAuth persistence typesStoredUser
types/chat/data-types.tsChat message structuresChatMessage (union), DocKind, SimpleDoc, DocumentRef, HistoryItem, HistoryGroup
types/documents/data-types.tsDocument entitiesDocItem, UploadedFile, DocSection
types/onboarding/form-types.tsOnboarding profile formFormValues (firstName, lastName, dob, about)
types/help/component-types.tsHelp form typesHelpFormValues, HelpFormProps, IssueSubmittedDialogProps
types/settings/component-types.tsSettings typesProfileData, ChangePasswordFormValues, EditProfileFormValues, NotificationSettingsProps
types/super-admin/dashboard/data-types.tsDashboard analyticsChartDatum, DocumentUploadData, CoachUsageData
types/super-admin/organization/form-types.tsOrganization formCoachInfo, OrganizationFormData, OrganizationRow
types/super-admin/user-management/form-type.tsUser managementUserRow

How to Navigate the Site

  • The app has two user roles: regular user and super-admin. After login, users are routed based on their role.
  • Regular users must complete onboarding (5 tutorial screens + 2 detail forms) before accessing the main app. The ProtectedRoute component enforces this automatically.
  • The sidebar navigation is the primary way to move between pages. Each role has its own sidebar with different menu items.
  • The Alex AI floating assistant is available on all user pages (bottom-right corner) for quick AI help.
  • The ProtectedRoute component enforces authentication, role-based access checks, and onboarding completion on every protected route.

Visual Site Map

Inspire Genius App | +-- Public Routes (no auth required) | +-- /login — Email/password login, social auth (Google) | +-- /signup — Registration with password validation | +-- /forgot — Password reset email request | +-- /reset-password — New password form (token from email) | +-- /otp — 6-digit MFA verification | +-- /accept-invitation — Invited user password setup | +-- /social-login — OAuth callback handler | +-- /terms — Terms of service | \-- /privacy — Privacy policy | +-- Onboarding (authenticated, pre-main-app) | +-- /onboarding/one — Tutorial screen 1 (triggers guided tour) | +-- /onboarding/two — Tutorial screen 2 | +-- /onboarding/three — Tutorial screen 3 | +-- /onboarding/four — Tutorial screen 4 | +-- /onboarding/five — Tutorial screen 5 | +-- /onboarding/details/one — Profile form (name, DOB, bio) | \-- /onboarding/details/two — Coach preferences (tone, accent, gender) | +-- User Pages (role: "user", sidebar: UserLayout) | +-- /home — Dashboard: PRISM video, Ask Alex, Explore Coaches | +-- /dashboard — Coach grid with search, click to start chat | | \-- /dashboard/:coach/chat — AI chat: real-time WebSocket, voice, docs | +-- /coaches — Manage coach preferences (voice, accent, tone) | +-- /documents — Upload, search, filter, download, delete documents | +-- /settings — Account settings, password change, notifications | \-- /help — Submit support tickets, view issue history | [Alex AI Floating Assistant available on all user pages] | \-- Super Admin Pages (role: "super-admin", sidebar: SuperAdminLayout) +-- /super-admin/dashboard — Analytics: org metrics, charts, licenses, trends | +-- /super-admin/dashboard/issues — Support ticket list | \-- /super-admin/dashboard/licences — License overview +-- /super-admin/users — User management: invite, edit, deactivate, delete | \-- /super-admin/:userId/coaches — Assign coaches to specific user +-- /super-admin/coaches — Coach management: add, edit, deactivate +-- /super-admin/organizations — Organization list: add, deactivate | \-- /super-admin/organizations/:id/view — Org detail: coaches, users, licenses +-- /super-admin/team — Team member management +-- /super-admin/issues/:id — Issue detail: admin comments, status changes +-- /super-admin/settings — Admin account settings \-- /super-admin/project-log — Project documentation dashboard

Auth Flow Diagram

User visits app / redirects to /login +-- Login with email/password | +-- MFA required? /otp --> verify --> route by role | \-- No MFA --> route by role +-- Login with Google --> /social-login --> callback --> route by role +-- Sign up --> /signup --> /otp (email verify) --> /login +-- Forgot password --> /forgot --> email sent --> /reset-password \-- Accept invitation --> /accept-invitation --> set password --> /login After successful auth: +-- Not onboarded? --> /onboarding/one --> ... --> /onboarding/details/two --> mark complete +-- Role: "user" --> /home \-- Role: "super-admin" --> /super-admin/dashboard

Sidebar Navigation Reference

User Sidebar (UserLayout)

Home Home — Dashboard landing page
Bot Chat with Coaches — Coach grid
TableProperties Manage Coaches — Coach preferences
FileText My Documents — Document management
Settings Settings — Account settings
HelpCircle Help & Support — Support tickets
+ Alex AI Floating Assistant (bottom-right on all pages)

Super Admin Sidebar (SuperAdminLayout)

LayoutDashboard Dashboard — Analytics overview
UsersRound User Management — Invite, edit, manage users
Bot Coach Management — Add, edit coaches
Settings Settings — Admin account settings
FileText Project Log — Project documentation

2026-03-31 — Cross-Project [VoiceDeskAI / InspiresGenius HelpDesk]
Create branded Word document user guide for InspiresGenius HelpDesk agent (https://vagentig.voicedeskai.co) and Company Admin Dashboard. Part 1: Admin guide (login, agent config, document uploads, tool setup, launching). Part 2: HelpDesk agent guide (interaction, 15 tools step-by-step, knowledge base, session export, VoiceDeskAI vs InspiresGenius distinction). Appendix A: 15-tool quick reference with Fees? column. Appendix B: Troubleshooting.
Documents/InspiresGenius_HelpDesk_User_Guide.docx
2026-03-31 — Cross-Project [VoiceDeskAI / InspiresGenius HelpDesk]
Update user guide: add Upload Document tool (Tool 15), add "Must be Configured by Company Admin, or Super Admin. Fees may apply." to all 15 tools, add "Contact VoiceDeskAI admin for fee amounts and requirements" to SMS, Phone Calls, WhatsApp, and Surveys (Submit Evaluation).
Documents/InspiresGenius_HelpDesk_User_Guide.docx

2026-04-04 — Prompt #167 [CDK deployment fix]
Fix the ECS Fargate CDK stack (infrastructure/cdk/lib/agent-engine-stack.ts) deployment failures. Issues: (1) CODE_DEPLOY ECS service missing explicit DependsOn for ALB listeners; (2) VPC Link stuck in PENDING during rollback — needs DependsOn on ALB and removal policy; (3) deprecated metrics APIs; (4) missing minHealthyPercent; (5) no resource tags. Verify synth succeeds with npx cdk synth. Do not deploy.
2026-04-04 — Prompt #167 [CDK fix applied]
[EDIT] File modified: infrastructure/cdk/lib/agent-engine-stack.ts — Added service.node.addDependency() for ALB+listeners+target groups; vpcLink.node.addDependency(alb)+DESTROY policy; fixed .metrics.unhealthyHostCount() and .metrics.httpCodeTarget(); added minHealthyPercent:100; added cdk.Tags.of(this) stack-wide tags. CDK synth verified passing.
2026-04-04 16:33:50

2026-04-05 — Prompt #213 [Deployment Phases 2-5]
Execute Phases 2-5 of the Inspire Genius deployment order. Phase 2: Created combined_migration.sql (10 tables, 22 indexes, seeds). Aurora is VPC-only, needs manual run from bastion. Phase 3: CDK synth passes, deploy initiated. Created deploy.sh automation script. Phase 4: Fixed ProcessBuilder.tsx TS error, frontend built (5.94s), deployed to S3 (inspires-genius-dev-frontend), CloudFront invalidated (EQNFTOWMBMKSA). Phase 5: Smoke tests — agent-engine healthy, auth responds, RLHF endpoints returning data, CloudFront serving HTTP 200.

User prompt submitted
2026-04-12 — Session Summary (Apr 10-12)
Multi-day session: Admin dashboard overhaul (30 frontend commits). Removed all fake data from dashboard, wired to real APIs. Renamed Coach→Mentor management with bulk actions. Fixed prompt builder (404/422/500 → working). Added multi-role login, RLHF corrections system, voice provider settings (Google/ElevenLabs/Polly), i18n live switching. Fixed activate/deactivate 400 errors, Cognito sync, audit CORS, dialog a11y. Created migration Lambda for Aurora data load. Generated 4 documents (architecture, user guide, migration guide, RLHF prompts). Pending: Lambda invocation for data load, PRISM vector re-ingestion, backend deployment.

/Users/williambrown/Dropbox/AES Material/Inspire-X/New IG Projects/Local_IG-App_UI/IG_project_log.html
2026-04-14 — Prompt #914 [Agent Data Audit]
Audit whether deployed agents can access platform data. Found: LLM, RAG, DB, Email, EventBridge connected. Critical gap: MemoryManager never initialized (memory_manager=None everywhere) — no conversation history, no user context, no PRISM auto-loading.
2026-04-14 — Prompt #915 [MemoryManager Wiring]
Wire up 4-tier MemoryManager (Redis + PostgreSQL + Semantic) — initialize Redis client and MemoryManager in main.py lifespan, thread memory_manager through REST/WebSocket/Lambda handlers into Meridian → orchestrators → agents. 17 new tests. Deployed to ECS Fargate. Agents now have conversation history, user context (PRISM, preferences, corrections), and working memory.
2026-04-14 23:29:11
[EDIT] File modified
/Users/williambrown/Dropbox/AES Material/Inspire-X/New IG Projects/Local_IG-App_UI/IG_project_log.html
2026-04-14 23:29:22
User prompt submitted
2026-04-14 23:29:29
[NOTIFICATION] Session stopped
2026-04-14 — Prompt #916 [Agent Training Guide Fix]
Fix Agent_Specialty_Data_Training_Guide.docx generator script — Section 2 had WRONG agent descriptions from older version. Updated all 18 agents with correct roles from deployed prompts.py: Alex is Student Success Advisor (not Chat and Coaching), Ascend is Leadership Coaching (not Growth Plans), Forge is Onboarding and Interpersonal Effectiveness, Sage is Knowledge and Research (not Document Management), James is Administration and Career Fit, Maven is Structured Interview Agent (not Business Strategy), Bridge is School-to-Career Pipeline Architect (not Notifications). Added 2 MISSING agents: Beacon (Notification and Communication Hub) and Grant (Financial Aid and Scholarship Navigator). Updated agents_settings.py to include Beacon and Grant in _BUILTIN_AGENTS list plus added Career and Talent as 4th domain category. Regenerated .docx file. Total: 18 agents across 4 domains.
2026-04-14 23:30:01

2026-04-15 — Prompt #939 [Albanian Language Support]
Add Albanian language support to the Inspire Genius frontend platform. Research current i18n system, create all 5 namespace translation files (common, auth, coaching, dashboard, admin) for Albanian (sq/Shqip), add to supportedLngs in i18n.ts, LanguageSwitcher.tsx, and translationCompleteness.ts. Verify build passes.

2026-04-27 — Prompt #984 [HTTPS WebSocket ALB]
/background continue where left off — Deploy HTTPS WebSocket ALB: ACM cert for ws-dev.inspiresgenius.com, HTTPS:443 listener with TLS 1.3, HTTP→HTTPS redirect, Route53 alias record, CDK stack updated with HTTPS listener + Route53 A record, GitHub secret VITE_AGENT_WS_DIRECT_URL updated to wss://ws-dev.inspiresgenius.com
2026-04-27 — Prompt #985 [Multi-Agent DAG Analysis]
Review Multi_Agent_Collaborative_Model_Implementation_Plan.docx — analyze whether completing all prompts enables full DAG orchestration. Found career_talent planner gap (missing domain mapping).
2026-04-27 — Prompt #986 [Doc Update: Multi-Agent Plan]
/background Add career_talent planner fix to Prompt 5.1 in the implementation plan document. Add new Prompt 5.5 for Multi-Agent Activity Indicator on Dashboard and Chat pages.
2026-04-27 — Prompt #987 [Deploy: Multi-Agent Collaboration]
Run the RAG deploy-rebuild procedure end-to-end, then verify the multi-agent collaboration changes are working. Build agent-engine Docker image, push to ECR, force ECS redeploy, run health check, inspect CloudWatch logs for tracebacks and multi-agent plan entries, then update session log. Deployed image digest sha256:f781a4f7... — new ECS task b53a1b0c started cleanly with no errors. Frontend commit/push deferred (sandbox blocked git ops in inspire-genius-frontend).
2026-04-27 — Prompt #988 [Fix: Prompt Builder save/retrieve regressions]
Investigate and fix Prompt Builder save/retrieve regressions in Agent Management — Tone/Knowledge/Style/Constraint sections don't display what was saved, and the Interaction Protocol new-entry doesn't save or retrieve. Root cause for the four section fields: getPromptVersions reversed array semantics — backend appends new prompts to the end, but the UI auto-loaded versions[0] (oldest) thinking it was the latest. For Interaction Protocol: frontend was forwarding the existing version, defeating backend auto-increment. Fixes: reverse array in getPromptVersions, take last element in getPrompts and the MentorManagement "Current System Prompt" panel, drop the version forward in protocolService. Also added 30 s TTL refresh on agents_settings DynamoDB caches and dropped interaction-protocol cache TTL to 30 s for cross-task visibility.
2026-04-27 — Prompt #989 [Fix: My Documents upload + agent-engine pgvector wiring]
Fix the My Documents upload regression (chat-panel upload works after e3da63f, but Documents page upload still appears to fail) and close the long-standing pgvector wiring gap so monolith uploads are vectorized into the agent-engine. Root cause for the Documents page: the sequential best-effort `await vectorizeDocument(...)` inside `useDocumentUploadMulti` blocked on a 30 s asyncpg-connect timeout per file, hanging the upload-modal progress animation past its 3 s "complete" jump and looking broken to the user. Fix: make `vectorizeDocument()` calls fire-and-forget in both `useDocumentUpload` and `useDocumentUploadMulti`; pass the monolith file_id as both `document_id` and `file_id` so the agent-engine can resolve via either alias. Companion agent-engine changes ready to deploy: `_get_asyncpg_conn` now uses TLS automatically when the DSN targets RDS / RDS-Proxy regardless of environment tag (was gated on staging/prod, causing dev timeouts); `/v1/agents/documents/vectorize` accepts either `documents.id` or monolith `files.id` and bridges via S3 download + text extract + documents-row upsert + embed/store. New IAM policy `MonolithS3Read` and ECS task definition revision 18 with `MONOLITH_S3_BUCKET` env var. Investigation found the agent-engine ECS task lives in a different VPC than the Aurora cluster (cross-VPC, no peering, overlapping CIDRs masking the issue at SG level) so vectorization remains blocked at the network layer until VPC peering is added — but the frontend fire-and-forget pattern means users see no upload errors regardless. Frontend CI run: https://github.com/willb77/inspire-genius-frontend/actions/runs/25019422074
